column1: # A multi-phase progression toward a target competition or PB attempt.
# Save as CSV (UTF-8) when you're done editing
# your student. They tap IMPORT PLAN FROM FILE in the Plans screen.
# The plan is split across five sections (META / PHASES / WEEKS /
# SESSIONS / EXERCISES). Lines starting with "#" are comments and get
# ignored by the importer. Edit the rows under each section's header
# add as many as you need. Every row is keyed by index columns
# (phase_idx → week_idx → session_idx → exercise_idx) so you can sort
# or filter rows in your spreadsheet without breaking the import.
# Phases group consecutive weeks. A typical season has 3-5 phases

column2: re-import the file in the app to verify it

column1: # parses cleanly. You'll see warnings for any unknown values.

column2: Two-phase build for divers with a 25-30m PB targeting 35m. Base builds CO2 + EQ rhythm; Capacity adds depth volume + mouthfill work.

column1: # One row per phase. phase_idx starts at 0 and must be sequential.
# type:  base | capacity | specific | taper | competition | transition
# One row per week. week_idx restarts at 0 inside each phase. Leave
# week_start blank to anchor at plan activation; the app fills in
# concrete dates when the student activates the plan.
# intensity: recovery | low | medium | high | max

column4: Establish session rhythm. Comfort and relaxation in shallow water.
column7: Don't push depth this week. Build the habit.

column4: Build FRC volume. Introduce bottom hangs at 10-15m.
Increase progressive dive depth. Add FRC mouthfill drills.
column7: Aim for 3 dives in the 18-22m range.

column4: Deload. Reduce intensity. Let adaptations settle.
column7: Easy week before pushing into Capacity.

column4: Final base week. Build back from deload.
Push depth toward 25m on adaptation dives.
Extend bottom hangs to 8-10s at adaptation depth.

column7: Quality over quantity. Two well-prepped dives is plenty.

3 dives to 5-8m. Long surface intervals (5+ min). Focus relaxation.
